title: PreHOI-Rank: Affordance-Grounded Candidate Ranking for Pre-Contact 3D Hand-Object Interaction Forecasting
description: PreHOI-Rank is a research-code release for leakage-safe, affordance-grounded candidate ranking in pre-contact 3D hand-object interaction forecasting on HOT3D-Clips. The repository includes scripts for HOT3D-Clips inspection, derived proxy-label generation, split optimization, candidate-order and forecast-frame leakage checks, candidate-ranker training, reproducibility documentation, and manuscript-support materials. Raw HOT3D-Clips data, processed dataset outputs, logs, checkpoints, caches, and model weights are not redistributed.
notes: Raw HOT3D-Clips data is not redistributed. Users must obtain HOT3D-Clips from official sources and follow the official HOT3D/HOT3D-Clips access, license, and citation terms. The archive DOI remains pending until Zenodo creates one for a GitHub release.
